xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NoteForNonApplicabilityOfTheDi: There is no default on loans and debt securities by the Company during the quarter ended September 30, 2025. Therefore, the said disclosure is not applicable.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureOfNotesOnFinancialRe:
Return On Assets:

3 months ended (for the quater ended September 30, 2025): 0.35%
Half year ended (for the period ended September 30, 2025): 0.78%
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherRelatedPartyTran: Service Charges for facilitating bank's infrastructure and distribution network to Fino PayTech Limited
Reimbursement of Common Expenses incurred by Fino PayTech Limited
Availing of Authentication services from ASA for AEPS & E-KYC
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ExplanationForTheDeviationOrVa: There is no deviation/variation in the utilization of funds
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:OriginalObject: Augmentation of Bank’s Tier-1 capital base to meet its future capital requirements
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureNotesOnObjectsForWhi: The proceeds have been utilised till 30th September 2025, for augmentation of Banks technology as per the objects of the offer.
